## Describe the bug

<!-- A clear and concise description of what is wrong. -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Clone the repo / checkout branch `...`
2. Run `pnpm install`
3. Run `pnpm dev`
4. Navigate to `...`
5. See error

<!-- What should happen instead? -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happens? Include error messages if applicable. -->

## Screenshots

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g., macOS 14.5 -->
- Node version: <!-- e.g., 20.11.0 -->
- pnpm version: <!-- e.g., 9.15.9 -->
- Browser: <!-- e.g., Chrome 120 -->

## Which part of the repo is affected?

- [ ] `apps/web` (Next.js frontend)
- [ ] `apps/api` (NestJS backend)
- [ ] `packages/ui` (shared components)
- [ ] `packages/prompts` (prompt packs)
- [ ] `packages/specs` (specifications)
- [ ] `packages/review-checklists` (review checklists)
- [ ] `examples/` (feature examples)
- [ ] `docs/` (documentation)
- [ ] CI / build infrastructure
